headings: INSTRUCTIONS FOR INVOICING AND COMPLETION OF THE APPLICATION FOR PAYMENT FORM
text: 4. Faxed or emailed copies of Invoices and Applications for Payment will be accepted. The originals are to be mailed and/or received  by  Contractor,  no  later  than  five  (5)  days  after  the  copy  is  received. This  Document  must  be  signed  and notarized prior to submission to Arch-Con for payment. Original Applications for Payment must include original notarized signatures.
